Imbued Granite Spaulders  
 

Lore Item
Slot: SHOULDERS
AC: 20
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10
WT: 45.0 Size: SMALL
Class: ALL except DRU NEC WIZ MAG ENC BST
Race: ALL except DWF TRL OGR HFL GNM IKS
Slot 1, Type 7 (General: Group)

AC: 20
SV FIRE: +10 SV DISEASE: +10 SV COLD: +10 SV MAGIC: +10 SV POISON: +10

"Stupidity isn't punishable by death. If it was, there would be a hell of a population drop."
-Laurell K. Hamilton
▲ Page top
On Sullon Zek
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2004 at 5:13 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591800596180
113 posts
The last I looked, a couple weeks ago, these are going for 10-14k in the Bazaar. That's because of the +10/all saves, which is pretty darn nice on a PvP server. But even with that in mind, SZ prices are sky-high, compared to those of other servers.
▲ Page top
Cheap
QuoteReply
# Sep 06 2003 at 4:43 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591788269762
36 posts
These spaulders have nice saves, i use em on my war when im ineed of them, but normally i use barbed dragonscale pauldrons AC:5 STR+5 STA+10 AGI+9 SV POISON+15... On my servor barbed dragonscale typically go for 4-5k and imbued granite spauldres usually go for 2-3k. However recently the spaulders have dropped to a mere 1k!!! Lots of prices are dropping even before the new expansion (People are trying to sell their items before they go way down in price after the new expansion release) So many people are trying to sell them that one person prices theres cheap and the next person prices their's cheaper and so on and so forth...I guess these are much better than barbed dragonscale for their price... I cant believe they go for 10k on your servors, but those may be out-dated posts. I know my servor is ultra cheap though...thought i would give a few going prices:

windblade 10-14k
swiftblade of zek 12-16k
runed bolster belt 15-20k
soulscream belt 15k
cloak of greater pernicity 5-7k
bracelt of might 2-3k
bracelet of fortitude 4-5k
bracelet of sense 6-7k
bracelet of comprehension 5-6k
bracelt of quickness 5-7k
cloak of flames 40-45k
clok of crystaliene waters (however u spell it) 30k
seb berserker cloak 12-15k
shortblade of lightning 10k
copper hammer of striking 8-12k
fleshgrinder 15k

those are just a few prices

later,
waywren tinyfist
52 Dwarven Champion

QuoteReply
# May 22 2004 at 1:40 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1623630270841
251 posts
windblade 10-14? HOLY COW windblade still 50-80k on drinal, and fungi is like 80-100k

Spaulders
QuoteReply
# Aug 30 2003 at 11:37 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254292149
98 posts
Also note that Barbs and Vah Shir can wear them and they are both large races.
▲ Page top
RE: Spaulders
QuoteReply
# Sep 02 2003 at 7:19 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756722720
22 posts
Not totally right ;)

These spauldors are for medium races only, but Vah Shir and Barbs count as both large AND medium race.
No large (ogr/trl) or small (dwarves, gnm, halflings) race only can wear it.
▲ Page top
Dropped in Raid
QuoteReply
# Aug 25 2003 at 2:37 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591787656221
47 posts
Was on a raid in the Hole on Sat Aug 23 when these showed up. Guildie named Fardar got the roll for them. They have sold in the bazaar on Kane Bayle for 10k...which seems very high but thats usual for it.

wow my server is cheap
QuoteReply
# Mar 13 2003 at 12:09 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782985242
25 posts
there are typically 2-5 of these in bazaar at all times on tholouxe paells, i see them for 3,500 and 4,000 all the time, they sell out quickly, then there r more up.... i think the hole might have a lot of extra activity on my server or something...
▲ Page top
What about big/small races?
QuoteReply
# Jan 31 2003 at 2:41 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1591776410526
Sage
280 posts
Is ther an equivalent shoulder piece that is wearable by big or small races? I was almost ready to pack up and go to the hole to get these only to see Ogre shaman cant wear. I still use Chokidai Shoulders, ok resists and nice WIS , but seriously lacking in AC compared to these. Obviously the weight means squat to a class that can buff to 255+ STR. What is a good upgrade to my shoulders that is fairly obtainable.

On an aside, does the Shawl of Protection still drop from Dracolich in PoF? AC 10 +35 all resists.
Thanks in advance.

58 Ogre Luminary on Luclin server--Chaotic Winds--Venerable Aggrok

QuoteReply
# Jan 13 2003 at 12:07 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592249788272
View User Forum
1 post
Was my first time here at the entrance of the haole and i won the role. I was shocked to hear that it is considered an ultra rae hehe. Now my 41st lvl warrior uses it. Let's just say a few group members were a little jealous hehehe.

drops

# Dec 13 2002 at 1:29 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1603066958094
210 posts
yes also drops off the revenants.

▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Nov 15 2002 at 3:48 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Well i was asked by a friend to come to the hole to help him and his group with a cr, and while we were at the pipe one of the mobs droped a pair, grr, group started this NBG crap, cuz i told them i would use it as a bed pan, and my need would be greater, , said its random everyone get shot else it wouldnt have been fair. heh so they agreed, we roll, and wouldnt u know it, the cleric got it, grr, greedy cleric,
Why not iksar?
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2002 at 2:39 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1593361085535
7 posts
Well if monks (leather) can use these then why did iksar warriors (and other iksar) get exclusivly axed from being able to wear these. This makes upgrading our Trooper Scale shoulders almost impossible to do without a full scale raid and same durn lucky dice. I just do not get it.
▲ Page top
RE: Why not iksar?
QuoteReply
# Jan 07 2003 at 6:20 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592759835412
55 posts
The restriction is based on size, not the item being plate/leather. Only "human sized" shoulders can wear this... Ogres and Trolls also cannot wear this item.
▲ Page top
RE: Why not iksar?
QuoteReply
# Oct 19 2002 at 12:35 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780119357
View User Forum
166 posts
These weight 19.4, I would not put these on a monk unless I hit the pipe really good before I logged on, and all the smoke blurred my vision and I could not see what I was doing. (O.o)

# Nov 01 2002 at 7:20 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1595780131429

Can't be a Plate Class item. Monks, Shammies, Rogues and Rangers aren't Plate Classes.

Sage
201 posts
No it's called Iksar get hosed. Some things are considered plate and therefore
no iksar. There seems to be no ryme or reason to this though. Hero Bracer is plate fine, but a serp bracer? Why not all bracers? My Iksar can wear Jade Inladed Spaulders, but not these. WTF?

# Jul 18 2002 at 2:24 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965791865

47 posts
I got my pair tonite off the rock golem at the bridge where ya drop down. This is the second one my guild has gotten off this guy in the last 2 days. This is a great place to hunt for xps and the loot for casters and the chance for spauldors makes it even better. I'm gonna stay here thru 58th when xpin to help other tank types and my barb brothers get pairs for themsleves in guild.

#REDACTED, Posted: May 29 2002 at 10:43 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) these shoulders dropped tonight in DL off a huge giant drolvarg :) my group was hittin and nukin for 20 mins and his hp didn't drop at all the singles in the zone made a run over and helped out he conned blue at 42 btw i won the rool with a 79 i think
Drop
QuoteReply
# May 27 2002 at 7:59 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251151773
2 posts
We where in the hole for a few hours on Sunday. Had 2 shoulders drop off of Ratmen warriors both times, in only about 2.5 hours. Once right at the enterence other was at the first pool. Hope this helps GL all.

Ppain Kneecracker 58 warrior
▲ Page top
Finally got mine this weekend
QuoteReply
# May 20 2002 at 10:29 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591770603889
Sage
62 posts
I was on a guild raid in the Hole this weekend and these dropped off a rock golem near the entrance right where you make the first jump down. We were down there hunting for a good 6 hours straight, killing golems ratmen, revenants, and elementals almost nonstop and only one set dropped. I would call that a rare drop. I felt sorta guilty taking them, though, because I was the lowest level character on the raid (44 bard) and not even a true tank. What's really sad is that these buggers are so darn heavy that I'm constantly encumbered. Next investment--strength jewelry.

well i would have to say these are pritty rare here we hav been taking our group here for exp for many lvls now door trash for a long time, now drop off and camp mostly by the door thare we got these one night off a golem after many many nights of killing in the hole im talkin i went form lvl 50 to 55 in this time.
